stemHtml: Which of the following would lead to the dissipation of sea smoke at a coastal destination?

options.a: Radiation cooling and the creation of a ground inversion.
options.b: Calm winds, allowing the build-up of high-level stratus clouds.
options.c: Inflow of warm air at higher levels, reducing relative humidity.
options.d: Inflow of unstable air, dissipating any surface inversion.
